issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (card gains Rush when played), not 'Activated' (manual activation)

Condition is incomplete. Must check: (1) Life ≤ 2 AND (2) Leader has type 'Whitebeard Pirates'. Current DSL only checks leader type with wrong condition type. Should use 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is incorrect for Rush keyword. Rush is inherent to the Character and lasts the game (Permanent), not tied to battle end

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] If you have 2 or less Life cards and your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains [Rush].
